category_breadcrumb: Health & Personal Care > Diet & Nutrition > Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements > Vitamins > Multivitamins
about_item: MULTIVITAMIN FOR ATHLETES: MuscleBlaze introduces Fuel One Sports Multivitamin- A multivitamin specially formulated to help athletes to give their best & achieve peak performance. | TRIPLE ACTION BLEND: Fuel One Sports Multivitamin offers an edge over basic multivitamins with its unparalleled Triple Action Blend that fuels Strength, Stamina and Recovery along with 13 vitamins & 13 minerals | ENHANCES STAMINA & ENDURANCE: Amp up your stamina and raise the bar of your game. Its Stamina blend contains potent ingredients like Beetroot extract, Vidaari tuber extract, Cordyceps & Vitamin B complex to bolster stamina & endurance. | POWERS RECOVERY: Reignite training with the Recovery blend. Infused with powerful antioxidants such as Astaxanthin, Green tea and Grape seed extract & key electrolytes, it negates oxidative stress and inflammation and powers your recovery. | BOOSTS STRENGTH: Jack up your strength and pack a punch with the Strength blend. Fueled with Ashwagandha, Safed Musli & Ginseng, it powers you for a blasting performance.
